strategies.name: Mean Reversion MTF
strategies.description: Multi-timeframe Bollinger Band mean reversion with EMA trend filter, RSI, and ADX confirmation.

strategies.name: Smart Money Concepts
strategies.description: Order block and fair value gap strategy based on Smart Money Concepts with higher-timeframe structure filter.

strategies.name: Liquidation Sweep
strategies.description: Trades liquidation level sweeps detected from open interest and volume spikes at leveraged price offsets.

strategies.name: Confluence
strategies.description: Multi-signal confluence strategy combining AlphaTrend, EMA filters, and SMMA for high-probability entries.

strategies.name: Trend Exhaustion
strategies.description: Detects trend exhaustion using momentum oscillators with multi-filter confirmation and ATR-based risk management.

strategies.name: Scalper LTF
strategies.description: Low-timeframe scalping strategy using EMA crossovers, RSI, and Bollinger Band squeezes on 1-minute charts.

strategies.name: Grid Trading
strategies.description: Grid-based DCA strategy that places orders at fixed intervals around a baseline price.
